strategy: Mean Reversion Version B with Fix A+C

entry_logic.long: RSI(7) < 25 AND Price > SMA200 AND Price < SMA10 AND ADX < 30 AND Volume > 500k
entry_logic.short: RSI(7) > 75 AND Price < SMA200 AND Price > SMA10 AND ADX < 30 AND Volume > 500k

exit_logic.rsi_exit: LONG: RSI crosses above 50, SHORT: RSI crosses below 50
